summary: Tested all 3 new features: rotating wisdom quotes, GAC auto-play, and SEO meta tags across all pages. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Auto-rotation of wisdom quotes is correctly paused on mouseenter (section). In Playwright, clicking a dot leaves mouse on section and pauses rotation — this is correct behavior by design, not a bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static site. All 3 features fully verified: 6 wisdom quotes with nav dots, GAC auto-play via IntersectionObserver, SEO tags on all pages, sitemap.xml and robots.txt accessible.

test_results.wisdom_quote_not_empty: PASS - first quote displayed on load
test_results.dot_click_navigation: PASS - clicking dot-3 shows Mahadeva/authoritative quote
test_results.quote_6_content: PASS - 'Love within the society is called Shivam, love across boundaries is called Poorvapoorvam'
test_results.auto_rotation: PASS - quotes rotate every 5500ms (pauses on hover as designed)
test_results.about_gac_first_phase_active: PASS - starts with Inception/Ganesha after scroll
test_results.about_gac_autoplay_cycling: PASS - phases cycle automatically (Inception -> Unofficial Impact observed in 2s)
test_results.seo_og_title_index: PASS - 'Shaivam: A Philosophy of Balance and Infinite Growth'
test_results.robots_accessible: PASS - correct User-agent and Sitemap directive
